dialogos.texto_en: I thought the main attraction here\nwas Churaumi Aquarium, but there seem to be\nmany other interesting places too.
Yeah, I'm getting confused on where we should go.\nThere's no way we can see everything.
Oh, if it isn't Uesugi-san.
Yo.
What are you up to?
I was wandering around, taking in the sights.\nWhere are you guys headed?
We're still deciding.
It's tough. Having too many options can be a problem.
The more we think, the more time passes...!
If we keep this up, we'll just end up\nstaring at the fountain until it's time to meet up!
That would be a waste.\nWhy don't you just move somewhere\nthat catches your eye?
Somewhere that catches our eye...
What about Emerald Beach? I'm interested in checking\nthat out. It's got white sandy beaches and emerald\ngreen waters, which is quintessentially Okinawa.
What about you, Yotsuba?
I'd like to conquer the seaside promenade.
C-conquer?
Oh!\nI should say 'explore' or something like that, right?
Well, I didn't mean it that way.\nYou can't really 'conquer'\na promenade in the first place.
Hey, Fu-kun, is there anywhere you want to go?\nCome on, don't waste this opportunity.
I can't think of anywhere in particular.
You're answering so quickly. Are you sure?
Well, I have nowhere in mind, so it can't be helped.
I mean, I get that, but you know,\nit's like when someone says 'anything is fine'\nfor dinner. It just make things harder, you know?
Yeah, I know what you mean.\nI wish you would consider our feelings more\nand not just leave it all up to us.
Ooh...\nUm...then, what about that 'Emerald Beach'\nyou mentioned, Nino?
I'm interested in Emerald Beach.\nIs it really that beautiful?
Yeah, look, there are photos of it in the brochure%p-2;――
Wow! Now this looks amazing!\nIt might be a waste if we don't see it in person.
Right?
I want to go too!\nIf that's ok with the both of you,\nI'd love to tag along.
Okay, then it's decided.\nWe won't be able to swim,\nbut let's go admire the view.
Alright!
Maybe taking a stroll could be good too.
What?\nThat's not an answer you know.
Well, maybe we could encounter\ninteresting things while walking?
You know, surrendering yourself completely to\nthe unexpected on vacation can be quite interesting,\ndon't you think?
I see.\nThat's a romantic idea.
Yes, now that you mention it... That sounds good.
Alright then, shall we take a stroll\naccording to Fu-kun's whims from here on?
Huh? Mine?
We're counting on what captures\nyour romantic sensor, Uesugi-san!
What's THAT sensor?\nI don't want you two putting any\nweird expectations on me.
Ohhh, this is...!\nIs this truly a real-life scene?
Of course it's real,\nwhat else could it be if not real?
But I know what you mean.
If you woke up and saw a scene like this,\nyou'd think you were still dreaming.
Well, I didn't think it would be this beautiful.
As expected, Uesugi-san's romantic sensor\nwould choose a place like this.
No, it's just that Nino's words about Emerald Beach\nstuck in my head, so I just ended up walking here.\nIt wasn't really a coincidence or anything.
That's fine.\nI was able to witness this scenery, after all.
We're planning to go to the beach this afternoon, right?\nWhy not swim here instead?
That might be possible, but\nchanging plans suddenly is difficult.\nBesides, I didn't bring a change of clothes.
Yeah, you're right.
It's a shame, but we'll just have to watch today.
We're planning to go to the beach this afternoon, right?\nWhy not swim here instead?
That might be possible, but\nchanging plans suddenly is difficult.\nBesides, I didn't bring a change of clothes.
Yeah, you're right.
It's a shame, but we'll just have to watch today.
Oh! You can see an island over there!\nDo you think we could swim all the way over there?
Hey, don't suggest something crazy like that\nout of nowhere.
Someday, I'd like to visit one of the outlying islands.\nBut we don't have time for that this time.
Right!\nLet's go diving in Ishigaki Island or Miyako Island!
In that case,\nwe'll have to come to Okinawa again with everyone,\nwon't we? You too, Uesugi-san?
Yeah, that's true.\nIf we have the chance, it would be nice.
We don't have to wait for the chance.\nWe could even do it this summer, couldn't we?
Really...?
Really!\nTee-hee!
(This summer, huh?\n I can't even imagine how I'll be living by then...)
